name: Spark Hire
tagline: AI-enhanced video interviewing platform for faster, smarter hiring
description: Spark Hire is a video interviewing platform that uses AI to help hiring teams screen candidates faster and more consistently. It supports one-way video interviews where candidates record responses on their own time, and live video interviews with AI-powered scheduling. The platform provides collaboration tools for hiring teams to evaluate, rate, and compare candidates efficiently, reducing time-to-hire significantly.
pros: Easy to use for candidates and recruiters
cons: Limited advanced analytics on lower plans
Video quality depends on candidate setup
